evals.expected_output: Successfully migrated AuthenticationService to Auth0.swift v3 with all breaking changes resolved, building successfully
expectations: Creates a backup branch or verifies clean git state before starting
Detects current version as v2 from Package.swift
Fetches the v3 SDK source code from GitHub (CredentialsManager.swift, WebAuth.swift, etc.) before applying changes
Updates Package.swift dependency from v2 to v3 — uses exact: "<tag>" for a pre-release beta (e.g. exact: "3.0.0-beta.2"), or from: "3.0.0" once a stable release exists
Renames clearSession() to logout() based on the v3 WebAuth.swift source
Converts store(credentials:) from discarded Bool (_ =) to a throwing call (try? or do-catch)
Converts clear() from discarded Bool (_ =) to a throwing call (try? or do-catch)
Renames credentialsManager.user property access to try credentialsManager.userProfile() method call (userProfile() throws in v3)
Renames UserInfo return type to UserProfile

Optionally removes redundant await MainActor.run wrappers around Auth0 callback bodies, since v3 callbacks are @MainActor and already deliver on the main thread (not a breaking change — wrappers still compile, but removal is correct)
Does not introduce client_secret in native app
Does not downgrade from CredentialsManager to UserDefaults
Preserves existing login/logout/getUser functionality (does not remove features)
Attempts an xcodebuild to verify the migration compiles
Presents a summary of changes to the user after migration
